creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
I can't reproduce the port build failure on CURRENT, but this problem is most
likely not related to zerotier; it may trigger issues, but whatever flakiness
is going on, is in the underlying network drivers. If your network stack isn't 
able to ping, this is the problem to address first.

I suggest we close this one, and open a wifi related one to start with.

You may see more useful info during wifi failures, with this in rc.conf:

wlandebug_wlan0="+state +node +auth +assoc +dot1xsm +wpa +scan"

that may shed light on why the wifi is dropping off.

On mine I see many many issues, some resulting in connectivity loss, but
that's not related to zerotier.
